name: Divine Serpent Apophis
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アポピス
desc:
2 monsters that mention "Temple of the Kings"
Must be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned by Tributing 2 "Apophis" monsters. Once per turn: You can target up to 3 "Apophis" Traps with different names in your GY; Set them. Once per turn, if a Trap Card is activated (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it.

action: Tributes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
summoning: Can be Special Summoned either by Fusion Summon or Contact Fusion
Contact Fusion without listed Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
